name: Chicken Ole2
recipeIngredient: 6 corn tortillas, torn into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the chicken.
2. In a bowl, blend together the soup, sour cream, milk, and salsa.
3. Place half of the tortilla pieces in the bottom of a 1-1/2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
4. Layer with half of the cubed chicken, chopped onions, grated Monterey jack cheese, grated Cheddar cheese, and the blended soup mixture.
5. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
6. Cover the dish and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
7. Remove from the microwave (or oven if preferred) and uncover.
8. Sprinkle lightly with paprika.
9. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
